summary: Iteration 104: Member Activity Feed Feature - All tests passed. Backend API (7/7 tests) and Frontend UI verified. The Activity Feed shows real-time member activities with live polling, green pulsing indicator, and correctly hides when admin simulates member view.

issues: Some trade logs show 'Unknown' for user_name - likely due to missing user_name field in older trade_logs records

critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/admin/activity-feed - Returns activities array with type, user_name, detail, timestamp, screenshot_url
GET /api/admin/activity-feed?since=<ISO_timestamp> - Filters to return only newer activities (for polling)
ActivityFeed.jsx - Shows green pulsing dot with 'Listening' or 'X new' status
ActivityFeed.jsx - Pulse animation on new items (animate-pulse class)
DashboardPage.jsx line 716 - ActivityFeed guarded by isAdmin() && !isSimulating
Activity types: habit_completed (with screenshot thumbnails), trade_logged
seed_data_creation: None - used existing habit_completions and trade_logs data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Member Activity Feed feature complete. Test file: test_iteration_104_activity_feed.py. Key data-testids: 'activity-feed' (main card), 'activity-list' (items container), 'activity-item-{timestamp}' (individual items). API at /api/admin/activity-feed supports 'since' and 'limit' query params.

verified_features.details: Returns {activities: []} with type, user_name, detail, timestamp, screenshot_url
Filters to only return activities newer than timestamp (for live polling)
Contains activity items with user actions
Shows 'Listening' or 'X new' with animate-ping animation
isAdmin() && !isSimulating guard on line 716 works correctly

verified_features.feature: Frontend: ActivityFeed only for admin users
